_comment: BetsPlug i18n glossary — single source of truth for terms that must survive auto-translation unchanged, plus per-locale overrides for phrases that Google Translate gets wrong. Consumed by translate.mjs (protect during translation) and review-translations.mjs (post-translate validation + optional auto-fix).
_doNotTranslateComment: Only TRUE brand names + product names + proper nouns that should stay identical in every locale. Common abbreviations (AI, API) are deliberately excluded — German prefers 'KI', French 'IA' etc., and forcing 'AI' everywhere hurts SEO. League names stay because they are proper nouns that readers recognise in English.
_preferredComment: Per-locale overrides for phrases where Google Translate's output is awkward. These are matched case-insensitively against the translated output; when detected, the review script flags the key and (with --fix) replaces it with the preferred wording. Keep this list SHORT — the goal is to nudge, not to hand-translate.
_validationComment: Heuristics used by review-translations.mjs. lengthRatio: flag keys where translated.length / en.length is outside [min, max]. duplicateOfEn: flag keys whose translation equals the EN source (except when EN is a brand name or numeric).
